item.title: workspace/skills directory and .skill-manifest.json created without security modes — skill capability enumeration
item.intent: workspace/skills/ and .skill-manifest.json must be created with mode 0700/0600 — the directory and manifest reveal which skills (and their vetting status) are installed, enabling targeted capability-specific attacks.
item.description: src/evolve/skills/lifecycle.ts saveManifest() (lines 49-56): line 54 calls mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true }) without mode — creates workspace/skills/ with default 0755. Line 55 calls await writeFile(manifestPath, ...) without mode option — creates .skill-manifest.json world-readable. The skill manifest stores skill name, source, install timestamp, vet result, and activation status — a capability map for the agent. FILE_MODE_EXEC is already imported from config/defaults.js; DIR_MODE_SECRET and FILE_MODE_SECRET are not.
acceptanceCriteria: On a multi-user system, a user other than the agent owner cannot list workspace/skills/ to enumerate which skills are installed
.skill-manifest.json is not readable by other users — skill name, source, vet result, and activation status remain private to the agent owner
